---
title: "A New Simulation-Based Estimator for Galaxy Infall Times"
subtitle: "Inferring the time since a galaxy has entered its group/cluster environment"
author: "Rizkallah Botros"
institute: "Department of Physics and Astronomy, McMaster University"
format: 
    revealjs:
        slide-number: true
        chalkboard:
            buttons: false
        preview-links: auto
        controls: true
        controls-layout: bottom-right
        css: styles.css
        theme: [default, styles.css]
    
        # incremental: true
        # smaller: true
        # scrollable: true
        # center-title-slide: false
        # theme:
        # reference-location: 
        # logo:
        # footer: "This is a footer"

    # resources:

---

## Introduction: Dense Environments

:::{.incremental}
- Turn off alarm
- Get out of bed
:::

## Going to sleep {footer=false}

- Get in bed

. . .

- Count sheep

:::{.footer}
custom footer
:::

## Columns

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}
Left column ^[A footnote]
:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
Right column
:::

::: {.aside}
testing aside class
:::
::::
